meanings.definition: an excerpt cut from a newspaper or magazine
examples: he searched through piles of letters and clippings

meanings.definition: cutting down to the desired size or shape
the act of clipping or snipping
sever or remove by pinching or snipping
run at a moderately swift pace
cultivate, tend, and cut back the growth of
examples: dress the plants in the garden

meanings.definition: terminate or abbreviate before its intended or proper end or its full extent
examples: Personal freedom is curtailed in many countries
